but you don't wanna lie to anybody. So, sometimes you might tailor that on the fly to make sure it applies to each and every different prospect. ## [15:07 - 16:55]

that this is the right thing and now is the right time because that eliminates uncertainty-based objections because essentially these objections down here, uncertainty-based objections, anything that has to do with them being less than 100% certain that this is the right thing, now's the right time, these are the hardest to handle and the most problematic, okay? We lose the most sales because of these. So the whole point of the committing phase is to get rid of those, okay? So there's three parts to this. There is temperature check, next steps, investment. So temp check is where we tie our prospects down on the process, okay? And we eliminate uncertainty objections before the close. That's basically what it has said. We make sure that those three to five steps, they feel like this is the right thing, now is the right time. So you go into specific scripting on the temp check, very easy. The next steps is where we paint a clear picture of what's gonna happen after the prospect makes the investment before telling them actually what the investment is, okay? So this raises the prospects level of certainty because if you drop the investment and they don't know how the onboarding works, what the next steps are after here, what's the normal process, there's kind of just this black hole, like they're throwing their credit card out there and it is black hole of uncertainty. So we wanna paint that picture as clear as we can on the other side to really help them understand exactly what's gonna happen next. That's gonna raise their level of certainty. Then finally, once we do that, we drop the investment, extremely simple.
